scope.summary: Make the served HTTP instance lock follow the XDG service state root and prove the accompanying isolated-state documentation describes that actual key.
out_of_scope: Live multi-listener execution against operator-managed service state.

entry_points.name: serve --listen state-root instance guard
entry_points.trace: default_service_instance_lock_path maps FileStore::default_state_dir to service-instance.json; the committed service_instance_locks_are_scoped_to_each_state_root test acquires independent guards for two roots, and README plus operations give matching distinct-XDG_STATE_HOME listener commands.

limitations: Manual review of committed source and its dedicated unit-test assertion. No clean source-exact two-process live run was produced, so this close does not claim the operator-run listener proof.
